label: Embeddings & distributed representations

node.label: Embeddings & distributed representations
node.definition: Learned vectors place semantically or functionally related entities near one another in a continuous space.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Embeddings & distributed representations is to connect Linear algebra, Information theory to downstream capabilities including Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Sparse coding & compositional representations, Contrastive learning.
examples: substrate for Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings
substrate for Sparse coding & compositional representations
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Information theory.

dependencies.rationale: Embeddings & distributed representations rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Linear algebra.
Embeddings & distributed representations rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Information theory.
Embeddings & distributed representations consumes, emits, or organizes information using Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
